lagareiro-octopus-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Lagareiro Octopus - Recipe
instructions: Put the octopus in a pan, add the washed onion and cover with water. Take it to the fire and let it cook until it becomes soft (about 50 minutes). After that time, turn off the light, retrieve the salt broth and let it rest for 20 minutes.
Wash the potatoes and put them on a tray. Sprinkle them with thick and light salt in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 45 minutes.

Remove the octopus from the water and dispose of it on another tray. Peel the cloves of garlic, lick them and join the octopus. Water with the olive oil, sprinkle with pepper and also bring it to the oven until it is golden.
Remove the octopus from the oven and water it with vinegar. Punch the potatoes and add them to the octopus. Serve everything decorated with morrine peppers and chopped coriander.

last-word-cocktail.name: Last Word Cocktail
instructions:
Pour 2 oz. gin, 1 oz. Chartreuse liqueur, 1 oz. maraschino liqueur (such as Luxardo), and 1 oz. fresh lime juice into a cocktail shaker. Add ice; cover and shake vigorously 10 times. Strain into 2 chilled coupe glasses or Martini glasses. Garnish each with a lime twist. 

Editor’s note: This Last Word cocktail recipe was first printed in our November 2011 issue. Head this way for more of our best gin cocktail recipes →

lavender-marcona-almonds.name: Lavender Marcona Almonds

ingredients.item: A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Finely grind lavender in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle (you should have about 2 tsp.).

Preheat oven to 300°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, stirring once, until golden, 15 minutes. Let cool, then transfer to a large bowl. Drizzle with oil and toss to coat. Sprinkle with sugar, lavender, and salt and toss again to coat.

lazy-longanisa-filipino-style-breakfast-.name: Lazy Longanisa (filipino-style Breakfast Sausage)
instructions: Combine sausage, brown sugar, vinegar, and soy sauce in a large resealable plastic bag; toss to coat sausage with marinade. Squeeze out excess air and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerate 2 hours to overnight.
Pour sausage mixture into a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add water and vegetable oil; cook and stir until liquid is reduced and sausage is browned, about 15 minutes.

leek-and-artichoke-fondue.name: Leek And Artichoke Fondue

ingredients.item: . bel paese cheese or whole-milk mozzarella

ingredients.prep: white and palegreen parts only, tough outer layers removed, finely chopped

instructions: Toss Bel Paese cheese and cornstarch in a small bowl to coat cheese and set aside.
Place peas in another small bowl. Bring 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan and pour over peas; let sit 5 minutes to soften. Drain peas, then set aside.

Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add leeks and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened but not browned, about 4 minutes. Add artichokes, season with salt, and cook, stirring, until warmed through, about 1 minute. Add wine and cook until almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes. Transfer mixture to a blender and blend until a coarse purée forms.

Wipe out saucepan and return purée to pan; set over medium-low heat. Wipe out blender and set aside. Add cream cheese and goat cheese to pan and cook, stirring, until melted and combined, about 4 minutes. Working in 2 batches, add Bel Paese cheese, letting first batch melt before adding the second, and cook, stirring, until melted and combined, about 2 minutes total. Reduce heat to low and keep warm.
Combine peas, basil, mint, lemon zest, and 1 Tbsp. water in reserved blender; season with salt and blend, adding a little more water if needed, until smooth.
Remove fondue from heat and scrape pea purée into pan. Return to low heat and cook, stirring, just until warmed through, about 1 minute. Taste fondue and season with more salt if needed.
Transfer fondue to a fondue pot if you have one and keep warm over a fondue burner; sprinkle chives on top. Serve with crudités and bread for dipping.

lemon-ginger-water.name: Lemon Ginger Water
instructions: Combine lemon juice, 1/2 cup water, ginger, and honey in a blender; blend for 20 to 30 seconds.
Strain the mixture evenly into 4 quart-sized mason jars or a 1-gallon pitcher.
Top off with remaining water and stir. Place lids on the jars or cover pitcher and store in the refrigerator.

lemon-jam-3-recipes-pequerecetas.name: Lemon Jam (3 Recipes)

instructions: Wash the lemons well with warm water to remove any residue. Peel the lemons, making sure you remove as much of a white part as you can as much as you can, as you can. Cut the pulp from lemons into small pieces and remove the seeds
Put the pieces of lemon into a big saucer. Add a liter of water and lead to a boiling with medium-high heat. Let them boil for 30 minutes, stirring from time to time so that they don't stick.
Add ginger and cinnamon branches to the pan with lemons. It removes well for flavors to integrate.
After 30 minutes, add 600 g of sugar to the saucer. It removes well until the sugar completely dissolve. If you choose to use pectin, this is the time to add it following the package instructions.

It reduces fire to medium-low and lets cook the mixture for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. The jam will be ready as soon as it's heavy and with a gelatinous consistency. You can prove it by placing a small amount on a cold plate and if it's broken with his finger, it's ready.
Stretch the glass bottles by boiling them in water for at least 10 minutes. Fill the frills with hot jam, leaving a small space at the top.
Close the bottles and place them face down for 10 minutes to create a vacuum.

lemon-dill-sauce-for-salmon.name: Lemon-dill Sauce For Salmon
instructions: Whisk mayonnaise, sour cream, mustard, lemon zest, lemon juice, Cajun seasoning, and dill together in a bowl until well blended.

lemon-pepper-roast-chicken.name: Lemon-pepper Roast Chicken
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine lemon-pepper, garlic salt, black pepper, thyme, and salt in a bowl; set aside. Slice 2 lemons into rounds for stuffing; reserve 1 lemon for juice.

Place 2 chickens in a roasting pan, not touching. Evenly squeeze 1 lemon over both chickens to coat. Divide sliced lemons, green onions, celery, and garlic in half; stuff into each chicken cavity. Tie legs together using cooking string, making sure legs are facing up. Pat spice rub all over chickens.

Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Rotate the pan; baste chicken with juices. Continue to bake, basting often, 50 minutes more. Increase oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C); continue to baste and bake until juices run clear and chickens are no longer pink in centers, about 40 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near but not touching the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

After 1 hour, open the foil to empty the liquids filled with baking on the baking pan.
We drop the foil. Rub the meat.
Turn the oven up to 200 degrees C and bake for 30 minutes.
It'll stay a little pink inside. If we want it better cooked, we bake it for 10 minutes more. If we use a thermometer, it must show 70 degrees C.
After removing it from the oven, leave it covered for a while, to recover its liquids.

lentils-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Lentils In The Pot
instructions: First, boil the lentils in a pot for 3-5’ with plenty of water and drain.
Throw away the dark water and drain the lentils. I like to heat them up and throw away the first water.

Cut the garlic and potato into small frames.

Place the cooker on medium heat
Add the olive oil and vegetables.

Add the garlic and the paste.
Mix for 1’ until the tomato pastes come out.

Add 1-1/2 litre hot water and secure the speed cooker.
From the time the lentils are built in the pot, boil at low pressure for 13’.
We withdraw the cooker and decompose.

life-of-the-party-nonalcoholic-punch.name: Life Of The Party (nonalcoholic Punch)
instructions: In a medium pot, whisk together 1 cup (220 g) granulated sugar and 1 cup water over medium heat until sugar is dissolved. Add 3 cinnamon sticks and bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook at a bare simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes to infuse flavor. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature, about 30 minutes. Once cooled, strain through a fine-mesh strainer and discard cinnamon sticks. Store in a clean, resealable container in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

In a large pitcher filled with ice, add 12 oz. Ghia Nonalcoholic Aperitif, 4½ oz. lemon juice, 4½ oz. pomegranate juice (such as POM), and 3 oz. Cinnamon Syrup. Stir well. Gently stir in 12 oz. nonalcoholic sparkling wine. Garnish generously with lemon and orange slices and serve in ice-filled wine glasses.

Do ahead: If serving later, combine all ingredients except for ice, nonalcoholic sparkling wine, and lemon and orange slices, cover, and refrigerate up to 8 hours; add ice, nonalcoholic sparkling wine, and lemon and orange slices at the last minute.

light-and-crispy-fried-halibut.name: Light And Crispy Fried Halibut
instructions: Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Whisk eggs, milk, and flour together in a shallow bowl. Stir panko bread crumbs and seasoned bread crumbs together in another bowl.
Gently dip halibut into egg mixture, then press gently into bread crumbs to coat both sides. Place the breaded halibut, unstacked, onto a plate. Repeat with remaining halibut.
Lower halibut carefully into the hot oil in batches. Fry until golden brown and crisp on the outside, 4 to 5 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Repeat with remaining halibut.

linguine-with-baby-heirloom-tomatoes-and.name: Linguine With Baby Heirloom Tomatoes And Anchovy Breadcrumbs

ingredients.prep: mashed to paste with 1 teaspoon oil from can

ingredients.item: Coarse fresh breadcrumbs made from crustless country bread
-pound container baby heirloom tomatoes or cherry tomatoes

instructions: Cook linguine until just tender but firm to bite. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.

Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil in large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add anchovies and 2 garlic cloves, then breadcrumbs. Cook breadcrumbs until golden, tossing to distribute evenly, about 5 minutes. Scrape crumbs onto plate and cool.

Heat remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons oil in same skillet over medium heat. Add tomatoes and remaining garlic clove. Cover; cook until tomatoes begin to break down, 3 to 4 minutes. Using fork, crush 1/4 of tomatoes. Add pasta, basil, cheese, and 1/2 cup reserved cooking liquid to tomatoes. Toss, adding more liquid if dry. Mix in half of crumbs. Season pasta with salt and pepper.
Transfer pasta to large shallow bowl; top with remaining breadcrumbs and serve.
To make coarse fresh breadcrumbs, trim the crust off slices of (fresh or stale) country bread. Tear the bread into chunks, then grind it in the processor until coarse crumbs are formed.

lunar-new-years-lychee-punch.name: Lunar New Year’s Lychee Punch

ingredients.prep: from one 20-oz. can of lychees in syrup

ingredients.item: Drained lychees and lime and orange wheels
Drained lychees and lime and orange wheels
Drained lychees and lime and orange wheels

instructions: Gently stir 2 cups chilled sparkling wine, ¾ cup fresh grapefruit juice, ¾ cup lychee syrup (from one 20-oz. can of lychees in syrup), ½ cup lychee liqueur, ¼ cup elderflower liqueur, ¼ cup fresh lime juice, ¼ cup gin, and 4 cups ice in a medium punch bowl to combine.
Garnish with drained lychees and lime and orange wheels.
Ladle punch into glasses.

lunch-box-hot-hot-dogs.name: Lunch Box Hot Hot Dogs
instructions: Prepare your child's lunch box by packing hot dog bun, ketchup, mustard, and Cheddar cheese.

Preheat your child's insulated beverage container by filling it with boiling water. Let stand for 15 to 20 minutes. I put the kettle on when I get up and let it heat while the kids get ready for school. Right before they leave, dump out water and replace with more boiling water. The preheating keeps it hot for a longer time. Place hot dog into the water and close the lid.
When your child is ready for lunch, they can take the hot hot dog out of the container and place it on the bun. Top with ketchup, mustard, and cheese to make a hot lunch from home.
